ci_commands.description: Phase 38 B22: commands the operator runs locally to validate the plan before substantiate. Must match CI for deterministic parity. Required from Phase 38 forward; earlier plans grandfathered at test layer.

high_risk_target.description: Phase 54: declare whether the downstream system being supported by this Qor-logic invocation is itself a high-risk AI system per EU AI Act Annex III. Default false; when true, impact_assessment is required.

pr_target.description: Phase 83 (GH #87): the branch this plan will be merged into, when it is not the default branch (e.g. a release branch 'RC1.4'). Optional; absent for plans targeting the default branch. Consumed by /qor-audit Step 0.6 delivery_branch_lint and the Phase 37 Delivery-Branch Currency sub-check.

originating_remediation.description: Phase 68 (GH #44): free-form reference to the issue, incident, or SG pattern this plan remediates (e.g., 'GH #44', 'SG-PlanTextDrift-A', 'the host project 3-VETO cycle 2026-05-08'). Read by /qor-audit Step 3.5 (Self-Application Sub-Pass): when set, the auditor manually performs the to-be-introduced discipline against the plan's own content. Optional; absence skips the sub-pass.

impact_assessment.description: Phase 54: optional NIST AI RMF MAP-3.1/MAP-5.1 + EU AI Act Art. 9 risk-register block. Required when high_risk_target is true.

change_class.description: Phase 168 (GH #248): the release class, previously carried only in plan prose (governance_helpers regex). Persisted here so the tier rules below are schema-enforceable. GH #282: 'governance' is the explicit non-release / version-not-applicable class for governance-only cycles where a version bump is inappropriate; version_applicability.validate treats it as version-not-applicable and the substantiate bump step skips.

new_ceremony_artifacts.description: Phase 169 (GH #251): net-new gate-artifact schemas this plan introduces, each with an L3-grade justification (>= 100 chars). gate_schema_freeze_lint flags unregistered schemas lacking this declaration -- ceremony artifacts accrete cost forever (research entry #378).

required_gate_artifacts.description: Phase 168 (GH #248, Shape 3 per research entry #394): the gate artifacts THIS phase must produce. Absent == the full chain (grandfathers all prior sessions). The short chain [plan, implement, substantiate] is permitted only for L1-risk hotfix changes (tier_guard verifies at implement time; completeness + provenance verify at seal/CI/merge); declaring it emits a severity-1 gate_override shadow event.

spec_deltas.description: Phase 192 (GH #277): behavioral spec deltas this plan authors. Each names the capability, the delta document (authored at plan time under qor/specs/<capability>/deltas/), the operations it carries, and optional grep-evidence for the changed surface. Linted at audit (specification-drift on failure); folded into the capability spec inside substantiate after PASS, then the delta file is deleted (git history is the archive).

feature_inventory_touches.description: Phase 73 (GH #41): per-feature TDD declaration block. Each entry names a feature touched by this plan, the operation kind, and the test path + descriptor that proves the feature works. Required-when-touching-src/ enforcement is operator discipline in V1; mechanical lint deferred to V2. Empty array is acceptable for plans that touch only docs/governance.
